_comment: This is the schema reference AND the generic default look (used when the user has no brand colours/fonts of their own). Copy this file per project, don't edit it in place. Headline lengths here also model the word caps in SKILL.md: cover 8 words max, hook2/content/cta similar.

slides.headline: A headline that never gives away the answer
Escalates slide 1, still doesn't reveal the payoff
One idea per slide
slides.body: One short sentence. Never a paragraph.

slides.headline: A specific ask, never 'follow for more'
slides.body: One sentence saying exactly what happens next.
